steps.t: Thórvilon is at the Kinta grove of Vartúlin, in Imhûlar.
Athgai stands at the border with Adagím.
Athgai told you to seek the grove of Laivárth, north-east along the path in Adagím.
Glorfindel stands in the grove of Laivárth.
Shadalith stands nearby in the grove of Laivárth.
Shadalith asked you to retrieve samples of the rot at locations to the north-east, north-west, and west of Laivárth.
Shadalith is at the grove of Laivárth.
Shadalith placed a bucket of water to the west. She wants you to add the samples of the blight you collected to the water so she can see if there is a…
